title: Peter Chan Says AI Will Replace ‘Any Blockbuster or Commercial Film in Three Years’ at Hong Kong FilMart Panel
description: Legendary Asian filmmaker Peter Chan Ho-sun issued a stark warning about artificial intelligence at a Hong Kong FilMart co-production panel, predicting that the technology poses an existential threat not to art-house cinema but to the commercial blockbuster. “I think we’re at the worst times. Those days of the blockbusters are gone. We’re experiencing now what [...]

title: Telecom firms eye gains from UAE $1bn AI fund
description: Discover how the UAE’s $1bn AI fund is set to boost Nigeria’s digital infrastructure, accelerate broadband rollout, and attract private investment. Read More: https://punchng.com/telecom-firms-eye-gains-from-uae-1bn-ai-fund/

title: Gemini Layoffs: Cryptocurrency Exchange Implements Drastic 30% Staff Reduction and AI Overhaul
description: BitcoinWorld Gemini Layoffs: Cryptocurrency Exchange Implements Drastic 30% Staff Reduction and AI Overhaul NEW YORK, December 2024 – Gemini Trust Company, the prominent cryptocurrency exchange founded by Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, has implemented a substantial workforce reduction this year, cutting approximately 30% of its staff through multiple layoff rounds. This strategic restructuring coincides with the company’s implementation of artificial intelligence systems to enhance operational productivity. Furthermore, these workforce [...] This post Gemini Layoffs: Cryptocurrency Exchange Implements Drastic 30% Staff Reduction and AI Overhaul first appeared on BitcoinWorld .

title: APAC IT Leaders Face Rising AI and Cloud Cost Volatility, Finds Info-Tech Research Group's Infrastructure & Operations Priorities 2026 Report | AAP
AutoStore unveils CubeVerse AI platform for warehouses
description: AutoStore debuts CubeVerse cloud and AI tools to boost warehouse throughput and real-time fulfilment without adding robots or grid space.
